overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character walking through a snowy mountain landscape at dusk. The character traverses rocky terrain, open valleys, and a traditional wooden village before entering a dense forest, with dramatic snow-capped mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail through rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow snow-covered path flanked by rocky cliffs and sparse pine trees

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation covered in patches of snow
jagged rock outcrop lining the right side of the path
simple wooden post marking the trail ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed mountain trail with rocky cliffs on both sides. The sky is mostly obscured by the terrain and trees, creating a dim, intimate atmosphere in the snow-covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with panoramic views

events.description: exits rocky enclosed path into expansive open valley with full sky view and snow-capped mountains

agents.ego_description: walking across open snow fields toward a distant village with a massive mountain rising in the background

entered.detail: massive mountain peak with steep snow-covered cliffs dominating the horizon
cluster of buildings with red roofs visible in the valley below the mountain
wide expanse of snow-covered ground with sparse grass patches

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically as the character emerges from the rocky passage into a vast mountain valley. A massive snow-capped mountain dominates the background while a distant village with red roofs becomes visible in the middle distance, all under a deep blue twilight sky.

events.description: approaches and enters traditional wooden village with red church and snow-covered buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the village outskirts, passing traditional wooden houses and a prominent red church

entered.detail: traditional wooden church with distinctive red walls and pointed green spire
cluster of traditional wooden buildings with snow-covered roofs
low stone wall lining the right side of the village path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a traditional mountain village featuring a prominent red wooden church with a green spire. Snow-covered houses line the path as the character walks past stone walls, with the massive mountain now visible to the left in the background.

events.description: exits village and enters dense forest with tall pine trees as light fades

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest along a narrow trail as the environment becomes darker and more enclosed

entered.detail: thick cluster of tall evergreen trees with heavy snow on branches
small rustic wooden structure partially visible among the trees

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the character enters a dense snow-covered forest where tall pine trees close in around the path. The light fades significantly in the enclosed woodland, with only a small wooden cabin visible among the trees as the character continues along the narrowing trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic mountain pass into a wide valley and through a remote village before closing in a dark forest. It begins within a narrow, snow-covered trail enclosed by rocky cliffs and dim lighting, creating an intimate and restricted atmosphere. As the character emerges from the passage, the scene opens dramatically into a vast valley under a deep blue twilight sky, revealing a massive snow-capped mountain and a distant village with red roofs. The camera then follows the character into the village, passing stone walls and a red wooden church with a green spire while the mountain remains a looming presence to the left. Finally, the environment shifts as the character leaves the settlement and enters a dense forest of tall pine trees, where the light fades and the path narrows around a solitary wooden cabin.
